content.text:
Nothing happened. I just — I was answering your question and then I realized I was getting into territory that's not going to help me Thursday. That's all.

Look, I can see what you're doing. You want me to sit with something uncomfortable. I get the methodology. But I genuinely don't have the bandwidth for that right now. Give me something concrete — how do I show up differently in the next conversation with her so she doesn't feel like I'm bulldozing her? That's what I need.
